objective: Expand unit test coverage for untested orchestrator modules
background: 20 orchestrator modules have no test file: service, signalStateClassifier, storage, tasks, types. Critical planner/worker/gate logic runs without regression protection.
constraints: Do not add tests that require a live DB or network connection
Use mocks for prisma and filesystem calls
Do not modify trading thresholds or strategy parameters
Do not require live broker connection
acceptance_tests: Test files created for: service, signalStateClassifier, storage, tasks
Each test covers: happy path, error path, and at least one edge case
Coverage report shows improvement in orchestrator module line coverage
required_outputs: Test files created for: service, signalStateClassifier, storage, tasks
Each test covers: happy path, error path, and at least one edge case
Coverage report shows improvement in orchestrator module line coverage
forbidden_changes: Do not add tests that require a live DB or network connection
Use mocks for prisma and filesystem calls
handoff_questions: Did you verify each acceptance criterion with evidence?
